---
title: "Hunter Lane Grazing Coop makes national tv news"
description: "Our neighborhood grazing coop, in your living room nationwide"
author: "Bo Laurent"
date: 2026-05-06
date-added: 2026-06-25
categories: [grazing]
---


<video controls width="100%" preload="metadata">
  <source src="/files/CBS_grazing_2026-05-06.mp4" type="video/mp4">
</video>
